IQ Test
Logic sequences, numerical patterns, verbal analogies, and spatial reasoning across 35 calibrated questions.

Visual Matrix IQ

Personality
💡
Assessment 03
EQ Test
Emotional intelligence across four domains: self-awareness, self-regulation, empathy, and social skills.
⏱ 8 min📋 20 questions
🔬
Assessment 04
Big Five Personality
The gold-standard OCEAN model — Openness, Conscientiousness, Extraversion, Agreeableness, Neuroticism.
⏱ 13 min📋 45 questions
🚀
Assessment 05
Entrepreneur DNA
Your entrepreneur archetype, business model fit, readiness to go solo, and personalised action plan across 7 dimensions.
⏱ 7 min📋 20 questions
Mental Wellness
⚡
Assessment 06
Stress Index
Perceived stress scale measuring how often you feel overwhelmed, uncontrolled, and overloaded.
⏱ 3 min📋 10 questions
🌀
Assessment 07
Anxiety Level
Generalised, social, and performance anxiety measured across key dimensions with GAD-7 framework scoring.
⏱ 5 min📋 14 questions
🔥
Assessment 08
Burnout Level
Occupational exhaustion across emotional depletion, depersonalisation, and reduced sense of accomplishment.
⏱ 5 min📋 15 questions
🧠
Assessment 11
ADHD Pattern Index
Adult ADHD self-report screening across inattention, hyperactivity, impulsivity, and executive function — ASRS v1.1 framework.
⏱ 10 min📋 40 questions
Self-Perception & Relationships
🎭
Assessment 09
Imposter Syndrome
Measures the gap between your actual competence and your self-perception — how strongly the imposter experience shapes your decisions.
⏱ 6 min📋 20 questions
💞
Assessment 10
Love & Attachment Style
Discover whether you are securely attached, anxiously attached, or avoidant — and what this means for your relationships.
⏱ 6 min📋 15 questions

These assessments are for educational and self-reflection purposes only. They are not clinical diagnostic instruments and should not replace evaluation by a qualified psychologist or medical professional. IQ scores are estimates based on a condensed test; standardised IQ tests administered by professionals are more accurate.
